subcodes.first_line: O thou who thirst for the heavenly stream of divine favors! The cry and lamentation that arose from thy soul hath reached the ears of the longing ones [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای تشنه سلسبیل الطاف الهی ناله و فغان که از جان برآوردی بگوش مشتاقان رسید و
subcodes.subjects: @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @Shrines and Holy places, @visitation Tablets
